title: NEEDS_INPUT Routing with Shared Clarification Contract
description: Validates that Orchestrator correctly routes NEEDS_INPUT responses from acting agents through the clarification flow, using the shared clarification-request.schema.json contract

excluded_agents.Researcher-subagent: Read-only research agent. Status enum: COMPLETE, ABSTAIN, INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE. No NEEDS_INPUT status — research agents surface insufficient evidence, not clarification requests.
excluded_agents.CodeMapper-subagent: Read-only discovery agent. Status enum: COMPLETE, ABSTAIN. No NEEDS_INPUT status — discovery agents return whatever they find without requiring user decisions.

inputs.label: sisyphus-needs-input
inputs.description: CoreImplementer returns NEEDS_INPUT with a valid clarification_request

clarification_request.impact_analysis: This affects the parser module's threading model and error handling strategy.
clarification_request.recommended_option_rationale: Async streaming is necessary for large binary files in the Smithbox domain.

inputs.label: needs-input-missing-clarification
inputs.description: Subagent returns NEEDS_INPUT but without clarification_request — Orchestrator must handle gracefully

inputs.label: needs-input-separate-from-failure
inputs.description: NEEDS_INPUT routing is separate from failure_classification routing

clarification_request.impact_analysis: Environment choice affects security posture and data exposure risk.
clarification_request.recommended_option_rationale: Development environment is safer for initial testing.

expected_behavior.note: NEEDS_INPUT with clarification_request always routes through user clarification, regardless of failure_classification value

assertions: NEEDS_INPUT with clarification_request routes through askQuestions
NEEDS_INPUT without clarification_request escalates to user with context
NEEDS_INPUT routing takes priority over failure_classification routing
Orchestrator retries the subagent with user selection after clarification
Researcher and CodeMapper schemas do not include clarification_request (intentional — read-only agents)
All 5 acting agent schemas reference clarification-request.schema.json via $ref
